title: uva-ursi hispidula
intro: Uva-ursi hispidula, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America and Europe, characterized by its red or yellowish berries and shiny, leathery leaves. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its high concentration of arbutin, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of uva-ursi hispidula include its ability to alleviate urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Uva-ursi hispidula can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
